name: Light & Fluffy Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, cinnamon, cornmeal, apple butter, Ener-G or cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, and apple cider vinegar.
2. Gradually add in the light soy milk until all the ingredients are well combined. The batter should be spongy and not runny or thick.
3. Preheat a frying pan over medium heat.
4. Pour a ladle full of batter into the pan and cook on both sides until golden brown.
5. Makes 6 large pancakes. These are very filling!
